case_title: JEANIE GEE VS. RARI ACOSTA et al

docket_entries.description: FEES NOT PAID. FILINGS OF RARI ACOSTA ARE STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT TO PARTIES.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GEE, JEANIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ACOSTA, RARI THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1410 32ND AVE. #103, S.F. CA. 94122, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

RARI ACOSTA HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE ROBERT DONDERO; CLERK: V. MU; REPORTER: J.
